productDisplayName: Crocs Kid's Gabe Duke Mid Tier Emboss Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionElectric blue sandals made of lightweight, form fitting, odour resistant EVA and back strapWash care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washDesigned for those tiny, tender feet of your little one, this electric blue pair of clogs from crocs is a fun footwear. Made of lightweight material, the pair has a Croslite footbed that provides ergonomic Fit and comfort. They also provide ample shock absorption protecting those tiny feet that keep sprinting about. This pair from the Crocs Gabe Clog collection has an upper with a 3D duke face on it, giving it a distinct personality, while the heel strap has holes in it to accommodate jibbitz for that decorative touch.Note: Jibbitz is a company founded by Rich and Sheri Schmelzer in 2005 to create decorative attachments for holes in crocs sandals.
